response.step_by_step_log:
1. Reviewed video for on-screen text. Text "FG ROADSTER", "フィーリングラデーション", and "Our Bright Parade" identified as song titles with their respective artist/project credits.
2. Performer identified as hololive talents based on event context (#holocountdown2025).
3. Conducted searches for lyrics:
   - "FG ROADSTER FLOW GLOW Japanese and English lyrics" (Lyrics not found as it's a newer release).
   - "フィーリングラデーション ReGLOSS Japanese and English lyrics" (Found).
   - "Our Bright Parade hololive Japanese and English lyrics" (Found).
4. Compiled JSON.
response.global_summary: The video is an excerpt from the "hololive production COUNTDOWN LIVE 2025" event. It features a medley performance of three songs: "FG ROADSTER" by FLOW GLOW, "feelingradation" (フィーリングラデーション) by ReGLOSS, and "Our Bright Parade" by hololive IDOL PROJECT. All performances are by hololive VTubers.

scenes.description: The scene starts with the "FG ROADSTER" performance by FLOW GLOW (Isaki Riona, Koganei Niko, Mizumiya Su, Rindo Chihaya, and Kikirara Vivi). Text at 00:23 identifies the song.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og: (Lyrics not found for FG ROADSTER, as it's a newer original song).
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: (Lyrics not found for FG ROADSTER, as it's a newer original song).

scenes.description: The performance transitions into "feelingradation" (フィーリングラデーション) by ReGLOSS. Text at 01:57 identifies the song.
scenes.song_title: feelingradation (フィーリングラデーション)
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
My heart starts skipping a beat
紐解いた新章
様変わりしていく show time
全然悪くない イマジネーション
視界の霧は晴れ渡って
悲しみに別れを告げる
酸いも甘いも 宙に放りだして
滲む空インクはバラ色
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
My heart starts skipping a beat
The new chapter I've unraveled
Show time is changing
It's not bad at all, imagination
The fog in my field of vision clears up
Saying goodbye to sadness
Throwing the sweet and sour into the sky
The ink in the bleeding sky is rose-colored

scenes.description: The performance transitions into "Our Bright Parade" by hololive IDOL PROJECT. Text at 04:41 identifies the song.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Parade, parade, parade!
It's time to take the stage
I hear the voices calling out your name
Parade, parade, parade!
A new journey awaits
Just hit reset and we can start again
